scripts.dev:server: set -a && source .env.local && set +a && cd server && go run cmd/server/main.go -port=${PORT:-50051}
scripts.build:macos: set -a && source .env.production && set +a && wails build -platform darwin/universal -ldflags "$(./scripts/build-ldflags.sh)"
scripts.build:linux: set -a && source .env.production && set +a && wails build -platform linux/amd64 -ldflags "$(./scripts/build-ldflags.sh)"
scripts.build:windows: set -a && source .env.production && set +a && wails build -platform windows/amd64 -ldflags "$(./scripts/build-ldflags.sh)"
scripts.release:server: git tag server-v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push origin --tags
scripts.release:desktop: git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push origin --tags
